key_factors.text_cn: 伊拉克被反复描述为直接、顽强且具备定位球威胁，因此伊拉克若在运动战中难以长时间推进，会更依赖前场犯规、角球和长传二次进攻。
key_factors.text_en: Iraq are repeatedly described as direct, tenacious and a set-piece threat, so if they struggle to sustain open-play progression, they will lean more on fouls won, corners and long-ball second phases in the final third.
source_names: The Athletic / The New York Times

key_factors.text_cn: 伊拉克被描述为防守顽强，并且持球直接，因此伊拉克若采用紧凑防守限制中路，挪威中路组合空间会下降。
key_factors.text_en: Iraq are described as defensively stubborn and direct in possession, so if they sit in a compact block to limit the center, Norway's central combinations will have less space.
source_names: The Athletic / The New York Times

key_factors.text_cn: 多项赛前材料称挪威在Solbakken下采用高压、快速转换的4-3-3，因此挪威前场高压压缩伊拉克门将和中卫的短传出口。
key_factors.text_en: Several pre-match sources say Norway use a high-pressing, fast-transition 4-3-3 under Solbakken, so their front-line press squeezes the short-passing outlets of Iraq's goalkeeper and center-backs.

key_factors.text_cn: 比赛环境：Iraq vs Norway is scheduled for Tuesday, June 16, 2026 at 6 p.m. U.S. ET。
key_factors.text_en: Match context: Iraq vs Norway is scheduled for Tuesday, June 16, 2026 at 6 p.m. U.S. ET.
